sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115437" key="yeudaioliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδ-αιολικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n115437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in false Aeolic,</tr_> of dialect, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:262H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.262H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
